metadata.title: GCP Compliant Storage Bucket Component Definition

components.title: cge-p-lab-bucket-module
components.description: Hardened upstream Terraform module for secure Google Cloud Storage deployment enforcing NIST SP 800-53 controls.
components.purpose: Automated infrastructure compliance gate and evidence generation.

satisfied-controls.description: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management: Enforces a strict 90-day Customer-Managed Encryption Key (CMEK) rotation period.
satisfied-controls.remarks: Verified via Terraform output validation key: kms_rotation_period == 7776000s

satisfied-controls.description: Access Enforcement: Hardlocks Uniform Bucket-Level Access and Public Access Prevention to block unauthorized exposure.
satisfied-controls.remarks: Verified via public_access_prevention == enforced and uniform_access_enforced == true

satisfied-controls.description: Audit Record Retention: Enforces storage bucket object versioning history tracking and retention hold policy.
satisfied-controls.remarks: Verified via versioning_enabled == true and retention_period_days thresholds

links.desc: Automated machine-readable compliance attestation artifact generated by local execution plan compilation.
